posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Like every week, you can join us in our Q&A session on May 3rd 14:00 GMT

Topics:

  • API
  • Apps framework (building of custom apps)

If you have questions or issues we can help you with (regarding these topics), or if you just want to listen other devs and what they are doing with monday, this is the right place for you!

If you have any questions about the use of the platform (regular use not related to building an app / API) then you can contact us here.

You can book your spot here !

See you there
